rationale: Educ. Code §32.152 governs student data privacy and prohibited uses of covered information by technology operators. It is wholly unrelated to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 32.152. PROHIBITED USE OF COVERED INFORMATION. (a) An operator may not knowingly:
_note: Rule text concerns student data privacy; proposed change concerns property tax homestead exemption. No overlap.
